overall.description: A nighttime walk through a rain-soaked beach boardwalk in GTA V's Los Santos, featuring the Del Perro Pier Ferris wheel, palm trees, and colorful storefronts along the promenade.

events.description: Ferris wheel lights change from purple to blue illumination

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet boardwalk toward the distant Ferris wheel

entered.detail: tall palm tree trunk with textured bark
tall dual-light street lamp illuminating the walkway
concrete trash receptacle on the sidewalk
green roofed shelter structure with benches
large illuminated Ferris wheel with changing colored lights
wooden and metal park bench facing the beach

segments.scene_description: Walking along a rain-soaked beach boardwalk at night, with palm trees and street lamps lining the path. The illuminated Ferris wheel glows in the distance as the camera moves steadily forward through the open plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial boardwalk with fast food restaurant

events.description: turning left from open promenade toward commercial buildings
passing by the Up-n-Atom Burger restaurant entrance

agents.ego_description: turning left toward the lit restaurant facade and continuing along the building front

entered.detail: white fast food building with distinctive yellow arch logo
bright blue building with classical arched colonnade
covered patio area with potted plants

segments.scene_description: Turning left from the open boardwalk toward a commercial area featuring a brightly lit fast food restaurant. The camera passes the Up-n-Atom Burger as the blue arcade building comes into view ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered shopping arcade with surf and skate stores

events.description: passing colorful storefront signs and illuminated displays

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered arcade, passing various beach-themed storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red clothing walking ahead along the building front

entered.detail: classical style white columns supporting blue arches
colorful surfboard and apparel store signage
yellow and red sign for canal treats and sunglasses
Sharkies skate shop signage with menu boards

segments.scene_description: Walking along the covered arcade of a bright blue building lined with surf shops and skate stores. A pedestrian in red walks ahead as the camera passes white columns and colorful storefront displays.

scene_state.functional_zone: parking lot and street intersection near boardwalk

events.description: exiting the covered arcade into open parking area with vehicles
approaching parked sports cars on the street

agents.ego_description: turning toward the street and approaching parked vehicles at the end of the boardwalk

notable_agents.action: blue convertible sports car parked at the curb

entered.detail: bright blue convertible sports car with red rims
white luxury sports car parked near the arcade
distant illuminated city buildings against the night sky

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered arcade into an open parking area where a blue sports car and white sports car are parked. The camera turns toward the street with the city skyline visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, rain-soaked beach boardwalk into a brightly lit commercial district and finally toward the city skyline. It begins by moving steadily through an open plaza lined with palm trees and street lamps, with the glow of a distant Ferris wheel reflecting off the wet pavement. As the camera turns left, the open boardwalk shifts into a commercial area, passing the illuminated facade of an Up-n-Atom Burger before approaching a vibrant blue arcade building. The scene then transitions under the covered walkway of the arcade, gliding past white columns and colorful surf and skate shop displays while following a pedestrian in red. Finally, the camera exits the covered area into an open parking lot featuring blue and white sports cars before turning toward the street to reveal the city skyline in the background.
